chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-234 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A No.8574/25. 20.10.2025. Mr. Muzafar Lakhair, Advocate for Applicant / Surety. ***************************************** The listed application has been moved by the applicant / surety seeking return of the surety documents. However, learned Counsel for the applicant / surety candidly concedes that the accused, for whom the surety was furnished, failed to surrender before the Trial Court within the time specified in the order dated 13.03.2025 and only after one day delay the accused surrendered before the Trial Court due to his health condition. Learned Counsel seeks exemption in this regard. In the circumstances, the surety documents, in the form of Special Savings Certificates would have ordinarily stand forfeited. However, as the surety has put himself at the mercy of the Court; therefore, in the interest of justice, the listed Application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety papers to the applicant / surety on proper verification and identification. JUDGE Ali.
